invitationForm.cancel: Emitted when the form is cancelled
invitationForm.submitted: Emitted when the invitation is successfully submitted

invitationForm.apps: List of available applications for invitation
invitationForm.appSchema: Zod validation schema for app selection
invitationForm.expiresAfterSchema: Zod validation schema for days-based expiration
invitationForm.expiresAtSchema: Zod validation schema for calendar-based expiration
invitationForm.expiryMode: Expiration input mode: calendar date picker or days input
invitationForm.invitationData: Initial data to populate the form
invitationForm.roles: List of available roles for invitation
invitationForm.roleSchema: Zod validation schema for role selection
invitationForm.submitLabel: Custom label for the submit button

subtitle.invitationForm: Invitation form is a comprehensive form component for sending user invitations with support for app selection, role assignment, and expiration settings.
